3400073293.message: ADAL user realm account response unknown Check your Microsoft Entra configuration, and make sure that users can successfully authenticate.

3399548929.message: Need user sign-in This issue should be transient. It occurs when the user quickly signs out before the enrollment task happens.

3400073236.message: ADAL security token request failed. Check your Microsoft Entra configuration, and make sure that users can successfully authenticate.

3400073247.message: ADAL-integrated Windows authentication is only supported in federated flow Plan your Microsoft Entra hybrid join implementation

3399942148.message: The server or proxy wasn't found. This issue should be transient, when the client can't communicate with cloud. If it persists, make sure the client has consistent connectivity to Azure.

2149056532.message: Specific platform or version is not supported Make sure the device meets the minimum requirements for co-management.

2147943568.message: Element not found This issue should be transient. If it persists, contact Microsoft Support.

2192179208.message: Not enough memory resources are available to process this command. This issue should be transient, it should resolve itself when the client retries.

3399614467.message: ADAL Authorization grant failed for this assertion Check your Microsoft Entra configuration, and make sure that users can successfully authenticate.

2149056517.message: Generic Failure from management server, such as DB access error This issue should be transient. If it persists, contact Microsoft Support.

2149134055.message: Winhttp name not resolved The client can't resolve the name of the service. Check the DNS configuration.

2149134050.message: internet timeout This issue should be transient, when the client can't communicate with cloud. If it persists, make sure the client has consistent connectivity to Azure.

0x87D20417.message: Scenario: When running Configuration Manager version 2010, you may notice that an automatic deployment rule fails and returns Last Error Code of 0x87D20417. In the PatchDownloader.log, you see Failed to create temp file with GetTempFileName() at temp location C:\Windows\TEMP\, error 80 and 0-byte fi
0x87D20417.description: Workaround: Remove all the files from the temp directory specified in the PatchDownloader.log and rerun the ADR. Resolution: Install KB 4600089, Update Rollup for Microsoft Endpoint Configuration Manager current branch, version 2010.

17002.message: Failed to complete the scenario (install). Possible reasons:Installation canceled by userInstallation canceled by another installationOut of disk space during installationUnknown language ID

0x87D30137.message: The device doesn't meet the minimum OS requirement set by the admin.
0x87D30137.resolution: Update macOS to the minimum OS version required by the admin.

0x87D3013E.message: The DMG file doesn't contain any supported app. It must contain at least one .app file.
0x87D3013E.resolution: Ensure that the uploaded file contains one or more .app files.

0x87D30139.message: The DMG file couldn't be mounted for installation. Check the DMG file if the error persists.
0x87D30139.resolution: Try manually mounting the DMG file to verify that the volume loads successfully.

0x87D3013B.message: The app couldn't be installed to the Applications directory. Sync the device to retry installing the app.
0x87D3013B.resolution: Ensure that the device can install apps locally to the Applications directory.

0x87D3012F, 0x87D30130, 0x87D30133, 0x87.message: The app couldn't be installed due to an internal error. Contact Intune support if the error persists.
0x87D3012F, 0x87D30130, 0x87D30133, 0x87.resolution: Something went wrong while installing the app using Intune. Try installing the app manually or try creating a new macOS app profile containing the app. Contact Intune support if the error persists.

0x87D30131, 0x87D30132.message: The app couldn't be downloaded. Sync the device to retry installing the app.
0x87D30131, 0x87D30132.resolution: Something went wrong while downloading the app. This may happen if the network is poor or the app size is large.

0x87D30135.message: The app couldn't be installed due to a device error. Sync the device to retry installing the app.
0x87D30135.resolution: This could be due to insufficient disk space or the app could not be written to the folder. Ensure that the device can install apps to the Applications folder.

0x87D3013A.message: The physical resources of this disk have been exhausted.
0x87D3013A.resolution: This could be due to the hard disk running out of space or binaries of the installation files being corrupt. Fix the Hard disk space and restart the Microsoft Intune Management Extension service and try again.

2016214710.message: The preinstall script provided by the admin failed.
2016214710.resolution: This might be expected if the preinstall script is waiting for a condition to become true before the app install can proceed. The failed preinstall script will be tried again at the next device check-in. Check the preinstall script if the error persists.

0x80072f9a.message: On Windows devices, when trying to sync in the Settings app > Accounts > Access work or school, you might see a The sync could not be initiated (0x80072f9a) error.
0x80072f9a.description: If the Trusted Platform Module (TPM) was reset to factory settings, then the device must reenroll to resume syncing. The device's Microsoft Entra identity is stored in the TPM. So, if the ID is removed, then reenrollment is the only way to reestablish the Microsoft Entra identity. ## Related articles

2016330897.message: Your connection to Intune timed out. Reset your connection.
